title: dactylorchis russowii
intro: Dactylorchis russowii, also known as the Russian orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is also reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Dactylorchis russowii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although its availability and usage are strictly regulated due to its endangered status.
